title: Sandy Dunes
description: Adds a subtle wavy texture to sand and other sand-like blocks
body:
![The "Sandy Dunes" Pack title. It is written in the Minecraft font with a wavy sand texture and displays Minecraft Cacti and dead bushes on top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/191e2fe26672282ee24063f81d531b10b8f359e3.webp)


### This resource pack adds a subtle _wavy_ texture to sand, red sand, gravel and soul sand.
The texture is mostly visible from afar while preserving the vanilla look from up close

![A minecraft desert with a wavy texture on the sand. There's a desert temple in the middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a26feb835dfe3af94a463480762000f1344681dc.webp)

### **[Importent!]** This Pack Requires either **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** or **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/)** to be installed and wouldn't work otherwise
